title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Lendingkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Lendingkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Lendingkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
